E

E_MMM_DD_HH_MM_SS_Z_YYYY - Static variable in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.luceneindexutils.LuceneUtility
 
EFFECTIVETIME - Static variable in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons.Constants
 
EnumAcceptability - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If EnumAcceptability value is,
ALL - refers to all description for a concept (both preferred and acceptable).
PREFERRED - refers to all preferred description for a concept (including FSN).
EnumAcceptabilityId - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If acceptability is,
ACCEPTABLE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for acceptable
PREFERRED - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for preferred
EnumCaseSignificance - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If case significance is,
INITIAL_CHAR_CASE_INSENSITIVE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for initial character case insensitive from the SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
CASE_SENSITIVE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for case sensitive
CASE_INSENSITIVE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for case insensitive
EnumCharacteristicType - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If Characteristic Type is,
INFERRED_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Inferred Relationship the SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
ADDITIONAL_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Additional Relationship
STATED_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Stated Relationship
QUALIFYING_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Qualifying Relationship
DEFINING_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Defining Relationship
EnumComponent - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If component is,
CONCEPT-refers to Concept class
DESCRIPTION- refers to Description class
RELATIONSHIP- refers to Relationship class
EnumDefStatus - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If definition status is
PRIMITIVE-refers to primitive concepts and returns the Concept id corresponding to Primitive from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
DEFINED- refers to fully defined concepts and returns the Concept id corresponding to Fully Defined from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
EnumDescType - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If description type is
FULLY_SPECIFIED_NAME-refers to fully specified name(FSN) and returns the Concept id corresponding to FULLY_SPECIFIED_NAME from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
SYNONYM- refers to synonyms and returns the Concept id corresponding to SYNONYM from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
DEFINITION- refers to Definition and returns the Concept id corresponding to DEFINITION from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
EnumDirection - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If EnumDirection value is,
SOURCE - refers to Parents direction.
DESTINATION - refers to Children direction.
EnumLangRefset - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If Refset ID is
UK- refers to Concept id corresponding to UK English
US- refers to Concept id corresponding to US English
EnumModifier - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If modifier is
UNIVERSAL_RESTRICTION- refers to the Concept id corresponding to Universal_Restriction from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
EXISTENTIAL_RESTRICTION- refers to the Concept id corresponding to Existential_Restriction from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
EnumProperties - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
 
EnumRefset - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
 
EnumRelationshipType - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
Provides the SNOMED CT Concept id corresponding to a particular type of Relationship
EnumSemantic - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.common
 
EnumSemanticTag - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
Provides the values for all the possible Semantic Tags/ hierarchies
EnumState - Enum in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons
If EnumState value is,
ACTIVE - refers to active Components.
INACTIVE - refers to inactive Components.
BOTH - both refers to active and inactive Components.
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model.Brand
 
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model.Manufacturer
 
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model.SubstanceDetail
 
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.Concept
 
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.ConcreteRelationship
 
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.Description
 
equals(Object) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.Relationship
 
ERROR_LOG_DIR - Static variable in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons.Constants
 
ERROR_LOG_FILE_NAME - Static variable in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons.Constants
 
ERROR_LOG_PATH - in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons.EnumProperties
 
ES - in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons.EnumLangRefset
 
Exception - Static variable in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.util.LoggerUtility
 
executeEcl(String, String) - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.service.ExploreService
Parses ECL query and fetches result.
EXISTENTIAL_RESTRICTION - in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.commons.EnumModifier
 
ExploreIndex - Class in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.luceneindexutils
Implementation of document search functionality with Lucene version 8.7.0.
ExploreIndex() - Constructor for class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.luceneindexutils.ExploreIndex
 
ExploreService - Class in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.service
Provides the basic methods to query the SNOMED CT repository for finding ancestors and descendants of a concept.
ExploreService() - Constructor for class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.service.ExploreService
 
exportRelationshipTableAndDeleteTCTable() - Method in class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.db.QueryManager
This method will export relationship table into a tsv file (for TC table creation)
ExpressionConstraintLanguageService - Class in in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.ecl
 
ExpressionConstraintLanguageService() - Constructor for class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.ecl.ExpressionConstraintLanguageService
